scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/sync-wasm --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/sync-browser-host/src/generated --out-name sync_wasm && rm -f src/generated/.gitignore
scripts.build:dist: bun run build:wasm && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p ../../dist/sync-browser-host/generated && cp src/generated/sync_wasm.js src/generated/sync_wasm_bg.wasm ../../dist/sync-browser-host/generated/ && cp ../../sqlite-wasm/dist/sqlite3-browser.wasm ../../dist/sync-browser-host/generated/
scripts.test: bun run typecheck && bun test test/unit && bun test/browser/run.ts
